From Shadrac, With All My Heart

My Love Letter To You

Tap to open

My Dearest Pamela,

I don't think I will ever find the perfect words to describe how grateful I am that you exist, and that somehow, out of everyone in this world, I get to call you mine. Every single day with you feels like a quiet miracle.

You bring a kind of happiness into my life that I didn't know I was missing until I met you. You are my peace when everything feels loud, my strength when I feel like giving up, my best friend who understands me without needing an explanation, and honestly, my greatest blessing.

I think about all the years ahead of us, and my favorite part of every single one of them is knowing I get to celebrate you, again and again, for the rest of my life.

💍 Our Anniversary — 28th November

I still remember choosing you then, and I would choose you again in every lifetime, on every 28th of November, and every ordinary Tuesday in between.

So today, I just want you to feel how loved you are. Happy Birthday, my love.

Forever Yours,

Shadrac ❤️

A Few Reasons, Out of Thousands

Little Things I Love About You

❤

The way you laugh at your own jokes before you even finish them.

✦

How you always know exactly what to say when I need it most.

❤

Your patience with me, even on my most impossible days.

✦

The way you love the people around you so fiercely and fully.

❤

How safe and at home I feel, simply because you're near.

✦

Every version of "us" I get to fall in love with, over and over.

One Last Thing

There's Something Else For You

"Pamela, you are the greatest gift God has ever given me. Every heartbeat of mine whispers your name. Thank you for being my happiness, my safe place, and my forever love. Happy Birthday, My Queen. I love you endlessly. ❤️" — Shadrac
